positive: A detailed, symmetrical, central composition of stylized celestial flora and fauna set in a bioluminescent twilight forest. Features glowing, crystalline mushrooms, abstract glowing vines, and graceful, stylized winged creatures silhouetted against a deep indigo and emerald nebula sky. The aesthetic is hyper-graphic, blending Art Deco geometric lines with intricate psychedelic patterns. Use strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast between glowing neon accents (cyan, violet, lime green) and deep jewel-toned blacks and blues. Perfect for a repeating, high-quality apparel print. Ultra-detailed vector illustration style, volumetric lighting, dramatic rim lighting, octane render, maximum depth of field.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, artifact, cropped, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, watermark, muted colors, sketch, grayscale, realistic photography
